en_title: Stargate Revival Axed by Amazon, 6 Months After Announcement
cn_title: 亚马逊砍掉《星际之门》重启剧集
subtitle: 说砍就砍
opus_summary: 亚马逊在宣布重启《星际之门》系列仅6个月后，突然取消了该项目。据《综艺》报道，亚马逊高层对剧集方向不满，认为其难以吸引核心粉丝以外的观众。该剧由《星际之门SG-1》编剧Martin Gero开发，原计划在Prime Video播出。亚马逊表示未来仍可能探索其他《星际之门》项目，但目前暂无制作计划。

paragraphs.en: Amazon has dramatically axed its new Stargate revival series, only six months after its announcement.
paragraphs.cn: 亚马逊在宣布重启《星际之门》系列仅6个月后，突然砍掉了该项目。

paragraphs.en: Details remain scarce on the show's focus, though Variety has reported that Amazon was sufficiently unhappy with its direction to have pulled the plug.
paragraphs.cn: 关于该剧的具体方向，目前细节仍不多，但据《综艺》报道，亚马逊对其方向相当不满，因此叫停。

paragraphs.en: Executives within Amazon reportedly lacked confidence the series would have appealed to a broader audience beyond the existing Stargate fanbase.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，亚马逊高管对该剧能否吸引《星际之门》现有粉丝群体以外的更广泛观众缺乏信心。

paragraphs.en: The unnamed Stargate series was being developed for release on Prime Video by writer, executive producer and showrunner Martin Gero, who previously penned episodes of the original classic series Stargate SG-1 and its spinoff Stargate: Atlantis. Stargate veterans Brad Wright and Joe Mallozzi were meanwhile onboard as consulting producers.
paragraphs.cn: 这部尚未命名的《星际之门》剧集由编剧、执行制片人兼剧集主管Martin Gero为Prime Video开发，他曾为经典原版剧集《星际之门SG-1》及其衍生剧《星际之门：亚特兰蒂斯》撰写过剧集。同时，《星际之门》资深人士Brad Wright和Joe Mallozzi担任顾问制片人。

paragraphs.en: In a press release issued last November , Amazon described the now-canned show as a "new original series" rather than a direct continuation of anything that has come before, in order to tell "a bold new chapter" of the dormant sci-fi franchise. However, it would "not be a reboot", Gero said.
paragraphs.cn: 在去年11月发布的新闻稿中，亚马逊将这部现已取消的剧集描述为一部「全新原创剧集」，而非之前任何作品的直接延续，旨在讲述这个沉寂科幻系列的「大胆新篇章」。不过，Gero表示，它「不会是重启」。

paragraphs.en: "I'm beyond thrilled that Amazon MGM Studios has entrusted me with guiding this incredible franchise into its next phase," Gero continued. "For those who've kept the gate active through conventions, rewatches, and unwavering faith — this one's for you. And for those that are new to our world — I promise you're in for something extraordinary."
paragraphs.cn: 「亚马逊米高梅工作室信任我，让我引导这个不可思议的系列进入下一阶段，我无比激动，」Gero继续说道，「对于那些通过展会、重看和坚定信念让星门保持活跃的人——这部作品是献给你们的。而对于那些新来到我们世界的人——我保证你们将体验到非凡之物。」

paragraphs.en: Stargate originally kicked off with Roland Emmerich's 1994 sci-fi film of the same name, which established a core group of characters expanded upon by hit television spin-off SG-1. Across 10 seasons and several TV movies, SG-1 then spawned its own sister show, Atlantis, and latterly a more separate, darker take on the franchise, Stargate Universe
paragraphs.cn: 《星际之门》最初由Roland Emmerich的1994年同名科幻电影开启，该片建立了一个核心角色群体，随后由热门电视衍生剧《SG-1》加以扩展。在10季和数部电视电影中，《SG-1》又衍生出自己的姐妹剧《亚特兰蒂斯》，以及后来更独立、更黑暗的系列作品《星际之门：宇宙》。

paragraphs.en: While Amazon has walked away from this project, the company is reportedly still open to exploring other Stargate ventures in future — though none are currently in production.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然亚马逊放弃了该项目，但据报道，该公司未来仍愿意探索其他《星际之门》项目——不过目前没有在制作中的项目。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
